title: Sidewalls
tmdbOverview: Martin is a neurotic web designer taking baby steps out of the isolation of his one-room apartment and his virtual reality. Mariana is an artist fresh out of a long relationship. They are perfect for each other, live on the same street, in opposite buildings, but they never meet. Can the movement of a modern city of three million people bring them together?
synopsis: Released in 2011, Sidewalls is a drama and romance film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.5 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
